source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 11 March 2026 | Governance and Administration Committee

2024/25 Annual review of Fire and Emergency New Zealand

Fire and Emergency New Zealand
- Ken Cooper, National Manager Response Capability
- Jim Stuart-Black, Chief Advisor Asset and Programme Delivery
